name: Micha's Brownie / Fudge Recipe
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the margarine carefully.
2. Melt and stir the chocolate into the melted margarine.
3. Mix together the sugar, flour, cognac or vanilla, and broken nuts in a separate bowl.
4. Add the eggs to the chocolate mixture one at a time, stirring gently after each addition.
5. Combine the egg mixture with the sugar-flour-cognar-broken nut mixture.
6. Pour the batter into a greased glass baking dish.
7. Bake in medium heat (375°F) for 25-30 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out dry.
8. Allow the brownies to cool completely in the pan before cutting and serving.
